svg.metadata:
{"_description":"Mermaid sequence diagram — exercises mermaid's autonumbering + activations.","type":"mermaid","title":"mermaid sequence","mermaid":"sequenceDiagram Alice->>Bob: Hello Bob, how are you? Bob-->>John: How about you John? Bob--x Alice: I am good thanks! Bob-x John: I am good thanks! Note right of John: Bob thinks a long
long time, so long
that the text does
not fit on a row. Bob-->Alice: Checking with John... Alice->John: Yes... John, how are you?"}
